title: heterotheca scabrifolia
intro: Heterotheca scabrifolia, also known as Rough-leaved Goldenweed, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antiseptic and antiviral properties. Heterotheca scabrifolia can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
